name: standards catalog: tier must be 1 or 2 per §2.6 operator-facing schema
command:
printf -- "- id: bad
  name: B
  url: https://x.com
  tier: 5
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
  class: published-standard
  authority_tier: 1
  fragility_tier: low
  fragility_strategy: silent-replace
  fetcher: html-anchor.sh
  identifier_pattern: x
  license_note: x
  origin: bundled
  added_by: plugin
  added_at: 2026-05-04
" > sources.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-standards-catalog.sh" "$PWD/sources.yaml"
